languages.text: "О, сколь давно я не принимал участия в спонтанных симпозиумах вроде этого!.. Пища для ума, которую вы мне предоставляете, коллеги, весьма ценна".
"Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."
languages.original_text: "О, сколь давно я не принимал участия в спонтанных симпозиумах вроде этого!.. Пища для ума, которую вы мне предоставляете, коллеги, весьма ценна".

traits.locale_text: "Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."
"Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."
"Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."
"Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."

languages.text: «¡Oh, cuánto hace que no participo en un simposio espontáneo de esta naturaleza! El aporte intelectual que me ofrecen, colegas, tiene un valor incalculable».
languages.original_text: "Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."

traits.locale_text: «¡Oh, cuánto hace que no participo en un simposio espontáneo de esta naturaleza! El aporte intelectual que me ofrecen, colegas, tiene un valor incalculable».

languages.text: “啊，我已经许久未参与过这种即兴展开的学术研讨了！各位同僚，你们所提供的思想养料，实在价值非凡。”
languages.original_text: "Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."

traits.locale_text: “啊，我已经许久未参与过这种即兴展开的学术研讨了！各位同僚，你们所提供的思想养料，实在价值非凡。”

languages.text: "Oh, wie lange ist es her, seit ich an einem spontanen Symposium dieser Art beteiligt war! Die Geistesnahrung, die Ihr damit anbietet, ist von immensem Wert, Kollegen."
languages.original_text: "Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, wie lange ist es her, seit ich an einem spontanen Symposium dieser Art beteiligt war! Die Geistesnahrung, die Ihr damit anbietet, ist von immensem Wert, Kollegen."

languages.text: « Oh, cela faisait si longtemps que je n'avais pas participé à un symposium spontané de cette nature ! La manne intellectuelle que vous m'offrez est proprement inestimable, chers collègues. »
languages.original_text: "Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, cela faisait si longtemps que je n'avais pas participé à un symposium spontané de cette nature ! La manne intellectuelle que vous m'offrez est proprement inestimable, chers collègues. »

languages.text: "Bu türden doğaçlama bir sempozyuma katılmayalı pek uzun zaman oldu! Sunduğunuz entelektüel besin, muazzam bir değere sahip meslektaşlarım."
languages.original_text: "Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."

traits.locale_text: "Bu türden doğaçlama bir sempozyuma katılmayalı pek uzun zaman oldu! Sunduğunuz entelektüel besin, muazzam bir değere sahip meslektaşlarım."

languages.text: 「ああ、こんな自然発生的なシンポジウムに参加したのはいつぶりだろう。同僚の皆さんが提供する知的栄養は、非常に価値がある。」
languages.original_text: "Oh, how long it has been since I engaged in a spontaneous symposium of this nature! The intellectual sustenance you offer, colleagues, is of immense worth."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、こんな自然発生的なシンポジウムに参加したのはいつぶりだろう。同僚の皆さんが提供する知的栄養は、非常に価値がある。」
